_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: RNA-sequencing of sgPTPN11 iPNs, identifying a total of 321 significantly repressed and 595 significantly induced genes
details: Successfully identified 321 significantly repressed and 595 significantly induced genes in sgPTPN11 iPNs, and 263 significantly repressed and 419 significantly induced genes in sgSOS2 iPNs
